company.what_they_do: Jayco Recruitment is an independent, multi-sector UK recruitment agency founded in 2016 and headquartered in the North East (Newcastle upon Tyne / Hebburn). They place temporary, contract, and permanent workers across four main sectors: Health & Social Care (nurses, carers, support workers), Hospitality & Events (chefs, FOH, bar staff), Industrial & Logistics (warehouse, drivers, production), and Permanent Recruitment (national coverage). Key differentiators include 24/7 availability, rigorous compliance/vetting, dedicated consultant per client and candidate, industry-specialist consultants, and a relationship-first philosophy over database-driven volume filling. They operate nationally but emphasise local depth from their North East base.
raw_notes: Founded 2016 by Jonathan Coates (Director) — started with 'a laptop, a phone, and a belief'
Team listed on homepage: Jonathan Coates (Director), Christine Winter (Finance Manager), Kurt Box (Business Manager), Suzanne Young (Recruitment Consultant)
Head office described in internal-roles page as 'newly purchased and refurbished Head Office in Hebburn'; Facebook lists address as 7-8 Blue Sky Way, Newcastle upon Tyne
Sectors: Health & Social Care, Hospitality & Events, Industrial & Logistics, Permanent Recruitment (national)
Also references IT/software/robotics permanent recruitment on /service/recruitment page — slightly broader than homepage implies
JAYCO Collective sub-brand for temp/flexible workforce solutions
Supplies over 5,000 hours per week to Health & Social Care sector (from blog post)
Clients range from local SMEs to multinational PLCs to charities and public sector
Permanent placement includes a 12-week after-care package with regular check-ins
Previously expanded into Yorkshire (Halifax branch) — blog post dated ~2020/2021; current homepage does not mention Yorkshire branch so status unclear
Management team cited as having 'over 50 years combined recruitment experience'
Core brand values: trust, integrity, long-term relationships, compliance, personal service
Internal teams include recruitment, compliance, finance, and marketing

individual.name: Jamie Grogan
individual.notes: Third-party data source (Wiza) identifies Jamie Grogan as Marketing Manager at Jayco Recruitment, based in Newcastle upon Tyne, England. This is consistent with the company's internal-roles page, which explicitly lists a marketing team as part of Jayco's internal structure. No LinkedIn profile or first-party bio was directly accessible. Jamie is not listed among the named team members on the current homepage (Jonathan Coates, Christine Winter, Kurt Box, Suzanne Young), but the homepage team section may not be exhaustive. No founder relationship — Jamie appears to be a staff-level marketing hire, not a founder.

could_not_find: Jamie Grogan's LinkedIn profile was not directly accessible — role sourced from third-party aggregator (Wiza) only; should be treated as probable but unconfirmed
No first-party bio or quote from Jamie Grogan found
Yorkshire branch current status unclear — blog post announced Halifax opening but homepage no longer references it
